creator: mistrla@imasy.or.jp
text:
Modify to respect NOPORTDOCS=yes and NOPORTDATA=yes that pointed out
	by itetcu@.
	Also 10 years overhaul was performed.

Fix: - Patch was uuencoded because it includes EUC-JP characters.
- files/rogue_s.6 was renamed to files/rogue_s.6.in with some modification.
  files/rogue_s.6 should be deleted.
  (repocopy is not required because it has few history)
- pkg-plist are now embedded in Makefile and should be deleted.
